opportunities.title: Godzilla Enters Marvel Multiverse RPG: How Do You Actually Statblock a 100-Meter Kaiju?
opportunities.why_now: EN World just confirmed Godzilla's addition to Marvel Multiverse RPG, and the rules-scaling question is the obvious hook.
opportunities.angle: Rules breakdown: analyze the Multiverse system's scale/size rules and predict how they'll need to bend to fit a kaiju without breaking action economy.

opportunities.title: Professor Dungeon Master's Deathbringer Interview, Annotated: What's Actually New in the Rules
opportunities.why_now: Fresh interview just dropped covering the upcoming Deathbringer product from Level Up's creative lead.
opportunities.angle: Line-by-line annotation of the interview, pulling out concrete mechanical claims (subclasses, monster design, encounter math) and flagging what's confirmed vs. teased.

opportunities.title: Monte Cook Games Adapts Between Earth and Sky: What Cypher System Changes When Novels Become Rules
opportunities.why_now: MCG just announced the tie-in, a fresh IP-to-system conversion worth dissecting before release details land.
opportunities.angle: Predictive rules piece: how Cypher System's flexible descriptor/focus framework will likely absorb the novels' setting-specific magic and factions.

opportunities.title: This Week in Written Rules: The July 18 Digest, Decoded
opportunities.why_now: EN World's digest just dropped, bundling the week's actual rules-relevant news in one place for a recap-with-teeth treatment.
opportunities.angle: Curated recap post pulling only the mechanically substantive items from the digest, with a one-line 'ruling' on each (confirmed change, rumor, or non-news).

opportunities.title: Kaiju Crossover Precedent: What Godzilla's Marvel Multiverse Entry Means for Future Licensed Statblocks
opportunities.why_now: The Godzilla announcement is a rare test case for how a non-Marvel IP gets folded into an existing rules chassis, worth a second angle beyond the initial news hit.
opportunities.angle: Analytical follow-up comparing this integration to past licensed-property rules ports (e.g., other multiverse crossovers), predicting design patterns for future kaiju/monster IP additions.
